list.label: Trace preset
list.name: trace_preset
list.query: All useful traces : duration >= 0ms, Slow > 500 ms : duration >= 500ms, Very slow > 1.5 s : duration >= 1.5s, Errors only : status = error, Submissions/tests : name =~ ".*(submission|solution|test|runner).*", HTTP API : name =~ ".*(GET|POST|PUT|DELETE|/api).*"

targets.expr: sum by (application, method, uri, status) (rate(http_server_requests_seconds_count{application=~"$application", uri!="/actuator/prometheus"}[1m]))

sum by (application, method, uri) (rate(http_server_requests_seconds_sum{application=~"$application", uri!="/actuator/prometheus"}[1m])) / clamp_min(sum by (application, method, uri) (rate(http_server_requests_seconds_count{application=~"$application", uri!="/actuator/prometheus"}[1m])), 0.001)
sum by (application, method, uri, status) (rate(http_server_requests_seconds_count{application=~"$application", uri!="/actuator/prometheus", status=~"5.."}[1m]))
histogram_quantile(0.95, sum(rate(http_server_requests_seconds_bucket{application=~"$application", uri!="/actuator/prometheus"}[1m])) by (le, application, method, uri))

panels.title: Tempo traces
panels.description: TraceQL search excludes infrastructure noise from Prometheus metrics scraping and Loki push calls. Click a Trace ID cell to put it into the trace_id dashboard filter for Loki logs.

panels.title: Loki logs by trace_id
panels.description: Logback writes trace_id into the JSON log line, so this panel parses the line and filters by the trace_id variable. Empty trace_id shows all logs.

panels.title: Log rate by service and level

targets.expr: topk(5, sum by (logger) (count_over_time({application=~"${application:regex}", level=~"ERROR|WARN"} | json | logger != "" |~ "${log_search:raw}" [5m])))

options.content:
### Fast path for defense demo

1. Pick **Trace preset**: slow requests, errors, or submissions.
2. Click a **Trace ID** in the Tempo table.
3. The Loki panel immediately narrows to log lines with that `trace_id`.
4. Use **Log contains** for keywords like `exception`, `submission`, `kafka`, `problem`.

Noise from `/actuator/prometheus` and `/loki/api/v1/push` is filtered out of the trace search.
